PCI DSS (Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard) is a globally recognized information security standard designed to ensure that all companies that process, store, or transmit credit card information maintain a highly secure environment. 🚨🇯🇵🇺🇸 SEKISUI Aerospace engineering data allegedly listed for sale  A forum actor claims to be selling a 70GB data package tied to SEKISUI Aerospace Corporation, described as a U.S. subsidiary of Japan’s SEKISUI Chemical and a supplier connected to aerospace and defense programs.  The listing claims the material includes technical PDF files, engineering drawings, STEP files for CATIA and SolidWorks, bills of materials, tooling and fixture data, material specifications, 3D models, and process documents.  The actor says the files relate to aircraft and aerospace components, with references to Boeing programs, NASA, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, and other U.S. defense or aerospace customers.  The package is listed for $200,000, marked as negotiable.  This claim is currently unverified.  💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines:   http://  darkwebinformer.com/pricing
